data.name: Ploy Co.
data.detailed_description:
Any questions or concerns? Ask me on my discord!

Welcome to Ploy Co.! A trap combo puzzle game.

What happens in the game:

1. In this game you control the main character, Bibi, as she walks around in an active work environment.

2. You can collect traps from trash cans, desks, and many more places.

3. Once you do, place traps to create combos.

4. Once you trap a specific target enough times, they will become enraged and chase Bibi.

5. If she gets caught, an erotic H-Scene animation will play. 

Meet Bibi (beebee):

Today, Bibi has decided that she needs to get dirt on every man in the office. Unbeknownst to these interns, IT, secretaries, managers, and many more, their days of safely working are over.

The main gameplay loop is moving around the office space (and other places) collecting supplies to craft traps. These traps will deal damage and push other employees around. Using one trap to push an employee into another trap will create a chain reaction dealing bonus damage for every trap in the combo.

In order to deal the most efficient damage, it is recommended to target the same employee repeatedly, so be careful that other employees do not activate and waste traps. Using traps like 'Banana' or 'Gum Wad' can prevent other employees from accidentally falling into the trap combo.

Banana Peel: Causes target to trip 2 spaces backward. Classic trap, if someone is walking the wrong direction Bibi can force them back into her trap combo using this.

Marbles: Causes the target to move back 1 space. Instead of being destroyed, this trap randomly moves 1 space as well. This trap is much too hectic to be used in a trap combo. Mostly best if everyone is going home for the day, and being a menace at the door way sounds fun.

Sticky Toilet Paper: Causes target to trip 1 space to the right. Target takes +10% trap damage for the rest of the combo. The workhorse of Bibi's kit, crafted by combining the Gum Wad and Toilet Paper traps. Easy to acquire, important to have.

Soda Bomb: Causes the target to take heavy trap damage and spawns puddle traps. When employees notice a cold soda sitting on their desk they can't help but drink it. Since they cause this trap upon themselves, Bibi gains no infamy. Perfect for innocent playthroughs.

These are just a few! 

30+ traps and schemes will be available in the full game!

Thank you for checking out my game! If you are interested in my other projects, feel free to check out my previous game, it would mean a lot!

data.short_description: Welcome to Ploy Co.! A game where you lead unsuspecting employees into traps, steal from their desks, email them threats from their manager's PC, gaslight them into thinking you're not targeting them specifically, and destroy an otherwise harmonious workforce in the name of making a safer place!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 or equivalent
  • 記憶體: 4096 MB (4 GB) MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD Graphics 4000 or better
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 100 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Integrated sound card
  • VR 支援: None
  • 備註: Requires keyboard and mouse; 1920x1080 resolution recommended
